description: Kurdish crime syndicate founded around 1960 in Lice, Turkey by Mehmet Sait Baybaşin. Known for heroin production and trafficking, operating in Turkey and Western Europe. Once called 'the most dangerous men in Europe' by the British Home Office. Currently led by Abdullah Baybaşin.
